seoTitle: Tarwin vs Tatong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tarwin and Tatong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tarwin and Tatong.
heading: Tarwin vs Tatong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tarwin, Victoria and Tatong, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tatong has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Tarwin (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tarwin or Tatong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tarwin has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Tatong scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tarwin scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Tatong scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tarwin or Tatong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tatong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
